name: 项目部署产物工作流
description: 约束客户端 AI 在桌面端 Runner 中打包或读取压缩包，并通过 MCP/项目能力推送到服务端部署产物模块，明确上传/部署接口和默认上传并部署语义。

proxy_entries.name: push-local-artifact
proxy_entries.description: Read a client-local artifact file and upload it to the project deploy artifact module via multipart API; optionally trigger deployment.

api_base.description: API base URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:8000 or http://127.0.0.1:8000/api. Can also use AI_EMPLOYEE_API_BASE_URL.

token.description: Bearer auth token. Can also use AI_EMPLOYEE_AUTH_TOKEN / AI_EMPLOYEE_TOKEN / AUTH_TOKEN.

file.description: Local artifact file path on the current client or desktop Runner host.

profile.description: Deploy profile ID, for example test or prod.

component.description: Deploy component ID, for example testpc.

artifact_name.description: Artifact name. Defaults to the file name.

no_auto_deploy.description: Set true to only upload and skip deployment.

dry_run.description: Set true to compute checksum and print the planned upload without network calls.
